Commands  ›   ›  Navigate To Clash Result In Model

Navigate To Clash Result In Model

writes to model Public API · not yet exposed

Navigates the UI to a clash identified by clashId: section box, active 3D view, selection, and zoom. Delegates geometry framing to Create3DSectionBox.FromElements.

What you'll see in the chat

on start
Navigating to clash in the model…
thinking
Resolve clash row from latest QA XML…
Frame clash elements in a managed 3D view…
Activate view and zoom to selection…
on success
Showing clash {clashId} in {viewName}.
on failure
Could not navigate to clash — {error}

REST API

Not yet exposed

This command does not carry a [RestApi] attribute today. Once tagged, this section will auto-populate with:

  • POST /api/v1/commands/navigate_to_clash_result_in_model
  • Request body schema (from [RestApiParam])
  • Response schema (from [RestApiResponse])
  • curl / JS / Python code examples

Keywords & intent patterns

navigate to clash · go to clash · show clash in model · zoom to clash
